hero.title: KrishiCarbon AI
hero.subtitle: Real-time carbon tracking, climate risk alerts, and verified soil intelligence — built for every Indian farmer.
feature.emissions.title: IPCC-Grade Emission Ledger
feature.emissions.desc: Calculate and log N₂O and CO₂e emissions from fertilizers and crop residue burning using internationally certified IPCC Tier 1 formulas.
feature.ai.title: AI Soil Verification
feature.ai.desc: Upload soil lab reports or speak in Hindi/Gujarati — Gemini AI extracts structured carbon data instantly.
feature.hub.title: Local Transition Hub
feature.hub.desc: Find nearby organic fertilizer suppliers, solar pump dealers, and low-carbon transition support — geolocated to your farm.
dashboard.title: Farm Carbon Dashboard
warning.reversal_detail: Intense heatwaves are accelerating soil organic carbon depletion. Deploy immediate organic mulching or moisture mitigation.
warning.heat_threshold: Temperature exceeds 38°C with low topsoil moisture for 3+ consecutive days.

ledger.no_records: No emission records yet. Log your first entry below.
